message:
feat(engine): expand IR3 instruction set with comparison, bitwise, and construct ops

Closes multiple parser gap placeholders by implementing real IR3 instructions:

baseline_interpreter.rs: Add handler arms for ~20 new IR3 instructions —
Mod, Exp, all six comparison ops (Lt/Lte/Gt/Gte/Eq/StrictEq/NotEq/
StrictNotEq), six bitwise ops (BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor/Shl/Shr/Ushr),
InstanceOf, InOp, and Construct.

execution_orchestrator.rs: Add telemetry label strings for all new IR3
instruction variants in the profiling match arms. Fix test that was
asserting the wrong error variant.

lowering_pipeline.rs: Update tests — `new` expression now emits Construct
instead of failing closed, template literal emits TemplateLiteral op,
comparison operators emit typed instructions (Lt) instead of Add placeholder.

lib.rs: Add patch_eval_completion_value() and ir3_destination_register()
to fix eval completion semantics so eval("1 + 1;") correctly returns 2
by routing the last expression's computed value to register 0. Register
6 new modules and import Ir3Instruction.

ts_normalization.rs: Add strip_hostcall_type_params() to strip generic
type params from hostcall<"cap">() calls for ES2020 parser compatibility.
Fix capability contract validation to accept declared capabilities when
hostcall.invoke fallback ops exist in IR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
